title: Living in Boulder Vlog 4- 4 - 2018: Did taxes

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps a low-key Wednesday: sleeping in, visiting his mom's house for a home-cooked meal, and finishing his taxes with her help. He plans to go on a bike/training ride the next morning and reflects on the uniqueness of his daily vlog format.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Nobody else vlogs every day about daily events the way he does — it's a unique and valuable genre
Everyone has off days; he's generally a hard worker and doesn't feel guilty about one unproductive day
Daily training documentation is a great content format he wants to start

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to sleep really late last night because I was making videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up late today as planned to sleep all day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to my mom's house and had noodle soup with squash, salad, and other stuff.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We watched the news at my mom's house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I did my taxes at my mom's house with her help.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I finished my taxes but got stuck in the box.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to go to the post office tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was trying to make videos but my computer kept crashing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going on a ride tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't think my subscribers have the opportunity to see the ride because my phone can't connect to my computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll bring a video camera or the GoPro soon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to do a lot of things.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Some people got upset about yesterday's video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There's no other channel like mine where I vlog every day about the events of the day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Starting tomorrow, the training genre is a great way to vlog because it's about the flow of training.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If anybody else vlogged like I do, I'd watch them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Nobody else vlogs or blogs about everything they do every day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm not the kind of person who just wants to do nothing all day and train.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If you put me on the scale of who works the most, I'd be at the top.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I didn't feel like working, but today is the first day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm looking forward to tomorrow and will get up really early.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll make sure to go to the stop tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today's vlog was kind of boring.
